sentences.target: Je vais au cabinet médical à pied.
sentences.reading: /ʒə vɛ o kabinɛ medikal a pje/

translations.fr: Je vais au cabinet médical à pied.
translations.ipa: /ʒə vɛ o kabinɛ medikal a pje/
translations.en: I’m going to the doctor’s office on foot.
translations.es: Voy al consultorio del médico a pie.
translations.de: Ich gehe zu Fuß zur Arztpraxis.
translations.ru: Я иду в кабинет врача пешком.
translations.pt: Vou a pé ao consultório do médico.
translations.vi: Tôi đi bộ đến phòng khám của bác sĩ.
translations.ar: أذهب إلى عيادة الطبيب سيرًا على الأقدام.
translations.nl: Ik ga te voet naar de dokterspraktijk.
translations.uk: Я йду пішки до кабінету лікаря.
translations.hi: मैं पैदल डॉक्टर के क्लिनिक जा रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Πηγαίνω με τα πόδια στο ιατρείο.
translations.nb: Jeg går til legekontoret til fots.
translations.id: Saya berjalan kaki ke klinik dokter.
translations.sv: Jag går till läkarmottagningen till fots.
translations.ro: Merg pe jos la cabinetul medicului.
translations.da: Jeg går til lægeklinikken til fods.
translations.ja: 徒歩でクリニックに行きます。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular of 'aller' (movement or near future).
Preposition 'à' contracted with the masculine singular definite article 'le' (à + le → au); introduces destination.
Common noun; here a medical office/clinic as destination.
Adjective modifying 'cabinet' (medical type).
Preposition introducing manner in the fixed expression 'à pied' (on foot).
Noun; part of the expression 'à pied' indicating means of locomotion.

sentences.target: Tu appelles le cabinet pour un rendez-vous.
sentences.reading: /ty apɛl lə kabinɛ puʁ œ̃ ʁɑ̃devu/

translations.fr: Tu appelles le cabinet pour un rendez-vous.
translations.ipa: /ty apɛl lə kabinɛ puʁ œ̃ ʁɑ̃devu/
translations.en: You call the office for an appointment.
translations.es: Llamas al consultorio para pedir una cita.
translations.de: Du rufst in der Praxis an, um einen Termin zu vereinbaren.
translations.it: Chiami lo studio medico per un appuntamento.
translations.ru: Ты звонишь в клинику, чтобы записаться на приём.
translations.pt: Você liga para o consultório para marcar uma consulta.
translations.tr: Randevu almak için doktorun muayenehanesini arıyorsun.
translations.vi: Bạn gọi đến phòng khám để đặt lịch hẹn.
translations.nl: Je belt de praktijk voor een afspraak.
translations.uk: Ти телефонуєш у клініку, щоб записатися на прийом.
translations.hi: आप अपॉइंटमेंट के लिए क्लिनिक को फोन करते हैं.
translations.pl: Dzwonisz do przychodni, żeby umówić wizytę.
translations.el: Παίρνεις τηλέφωνο στο ιατρείο για ραντεβού.
translations.nb: Du ringer til legekontoret for å bestille time.
translations.id: Kamu menelepon klinik untuk membuat janji temu.
translations.sv: Du ringer mottagningen för att boka en tid.
translations.ro: Suni la cabinet pentru o programare.
translations.cs: Voláš do ordinace kvůli objednání termínu.
translations.da: Du ringer til klinikken for at bestille tid.
translations.ja: 予約のためにクリニックに電話します。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular (informal).
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner for 'cabinet'.
Common noun; direct object of 'appelles'.
Preposition indicating purpose ('for').
Indefinite article, masculine singular.
Hyphenated compound noun meaning 'appointment'; object of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: On attend longtemps dans le cabinet dentaire.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ atɑ̃ lɔ̃tɑ̃ dɑ̃ lə kabinɛ dɑ̃tɛʁ/

translations.fr: On attend longtemps dans le cabinet dentaire.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ atɑ̃ lɔ̃tɑ̃ dɑ̃ lə kabinɛ dɑ̃tɛʁ/
translations.en: We’re waiting a long time at the dentist’s.
translations.es: Estamos esperando mucho en la clínica dental.
translations.de: Wir warten lange in der Zahnarztpraxis.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在牙科诊所等了很久。
translations.yue: 我哋喺牙醫診所等咗好耐。
translations.ru: Мы долго ждём в стоматологической клинике.
translations.pt: Estamos esperando há muito tempo no consultório do dentista.
translations.he: אנחנו מחכים הרבה זמן במרפאת השיניים.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi chờ rất lâu tại phòng khám nha khoa.
translations.ar: ننتظر وقتًا طويلًا في عيادة الأسنان.
translations.nl: We wachten lang bij de tandarts.
translations.uk: Ми довго чекаємо в стоматологічній клініці.
translations.hi: हम दंत चिकित्सक के क्लिनिक में बहुत देर तक इंतज़ार कर रहे हैं.
translations.id: Kami menunggu lama di klinik gigi.
translations.ja: 歯医者で長く待っています。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/inclusive subject pronoun; takes 3rd person singular verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Adverb indicating duration; modifies 'attend'.
Preposition indicating location.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner for 'cabinet'.
Common noun; object of 'dans'.
Adjective modifying 'cabinet' (dentist's office).

sentences.target: Nous voulons changer de cabinet d’avocats.

translations.fr: Nous voulons changer de cabinet d’avocats.
translations.en: We want to change law firms.
translations.es: Queremos cambiar de bufete de abogados.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们想换一家律师事务所。
translations.pt: Queremos mudar de escritório de advocacia.
translations.he: אנחנו רוצים להחליף משרד עורכי דין.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi muốn đổi công ty luật.
translations.hi: हम वकालत का दफ्तर बदलना चाहते हैं.
translations.id: Kami ingin pindah ke firma hukum lain.
translations.ro: Vrem să schimbăm firma de avocatură.
translations.ja: 私たちは法律事務所を変えたいです。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person plural.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; expresses desire.
Infinitive verb complement of 'voulons' (what is intended).
Preposition used in the construction 'changer de' to mark the thing being changed.
Common noun; here a professional office/firm, object of 'changer de'.
Elided form of the preposition 'de' before a vowel-initial word.
Common noun, plural; complements 'cabinet' ('cabinet d’avocats' = law firm).
